core_checks.name: lr_scheduler
core_checks.note: MLX cosine_decay is the notebook cosine equivalent.

core_checks.name: optimizer_steps
core_checks.note: Notebook parity requires flushing grad accumulation at each epoch boundary, not only at the final global remainder.

core_checks.name: logging_steps
core_checks.note: HF logging_steps counts optimizer updates, not raw microsteps.

core_checks.name: save_strategy
core_checks.note: MLX save_every<=0 means final-only save, matching save_strategy='no'.

core_checks.name: mask_prompt
core_checks.note: HF notebook does not enable assistant_only_loss/completion_only_loss here; MLX parity should therefore keep mask_prompt=False.

lora_target_mapping.note: MLX keys must cover the notebook's in/out/up/down projection intent; extra switch/shared-expert keys are intentional Nemotron-H MoE mappings.

framework_specific_mappings.mlx: DEFAULT_MODEL_ROOT is a BF16 MLX checkpoint.
steps_per_report=10 with steps_per_report_step_unit=optimizer for comparable loss/LR checkpoints.
Use mask_prompt=False for parity with full-sequence loss.
No equivalent knob in mlx_lm LoRA config.
Not applicable to mlx_lm dataset/config surface.

mlx_scaffolding.name: valid_shadow_rows
mlx_scaffolding.note: HF notebook has no validation loop; MLX uses a tiny shadow validation set only for observability.

mlx_scaffolding.name: steps_per_eval
mlx_scaffolding.note: steps_per_eval<=0 resolves to total_iters so there are no intermediate validations.

mlx_scaffolding.name: lr_schedule_step_unit
mlx_scaffolding.note: Optimizer-step scheduling is required for notebook parity under mlx_lm grad accumulation.

mlx_scaffolding.name: shadow_model
mlx_scaffolding.note: MLX load path uses a patched shadow_model to avoid tokenizer/runtime mismatches.

mlx_scaffolding.name: tokenizer_special_tokens
mlx_scaffolding.note: MLX training load normalizes eos_token_ids and sets pad_token=eos_token when absent, matching the HF log alignment to eos/pad token id 11.

mlx_scaffolding.name: final_grad_accumulation_flush
mlx_scaffolding.note: MLX trainer is patched so the final partial accumulation matches notebook optimizer-step count.

mlx_current.note: This script still emits a local MLX bundle and does not claim PEFT/vLLM submission compatibility.
